     the Fermi energy is     1.5361 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.27127862 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.1E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.28840479 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -283799.17162534 Ry
